title: Researchers
summary: This is a navigation/listing page for Bank of England researchers that provides only a generic description of staff research activities. It contains no specific research findings, data releases, or policy-relevant content. The page last updated 19 November 2025.
key_points: Page is a general listing/overview page for BoE researchers, not a source of specific research
No individual researcher profiles or their specific publications are detailed in the provided content
Mentions only generically that staff publish in journals, Financial Stability Papers, working papers, and Bank Insights
No dates, titles, or findings from any specific research are provided
Page functions as a navigation hub with search and filter functionality mentioned
No content related to market structure or macro catalysts present
why_it_matters: This source provides no actionable information for finance research. It is a personnel/listing page with no specific research findings, data, or policy content that would be useful for market analysis or RAG retrieval.

issues_found: Source is a listing/navigation page (source_type: listing_page) - per Rule 5, reject pages of this type
No substantive research content present - only generic description of staff research activities
No specific publication dates, titles, or findings provided
Cannot assess relevance to market structure or macro catalysts as page contains no actionable content
event_type set to 'unknown' when the correct classification (listing_page) is obvious from context
Source is a thin, low-signal page with no archival value per Rule 6

notes: Source is a navigation/listing page per rule 6 - non-archiveable. No specific research content present. Last updated 19 November 2025. This page serves as a directory/index but contains no archiveable research findings, data releases, or policy content relevant to market structure or macro catalysts. Recommend crawling specific publication pages (working papers, Financial Stability Papers) for actual research content.
